message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 183 — workflow fail_execution cx-threaded

per-step cancel seam, step-execute error, retry-exhausted, 3
step-kind abort branches. Cx flows into storage on error paths.
31/31 runner tests pass.
